title: Construct stone structures and features, and install stone cladding
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Construct stone structures and features, and install stone cladding demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare work

pcs.text: Interpret site plans and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret site plans and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret site plans and specifications.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select stone according to design specifications.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools and equipment required for construction work and check for safe operation.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report environmental impacts of erecting stone structures.

indicators_of_strong_understanding: Demonstrates precise, contextual, technically accurate knowledge with workplace application
